reference_block.name: scope
reference_block.title: Scope
reference_block.statement: Use this bundle for Cloudflare Workers, Pages, Wrangler, bindings, D1, KV, R2, Durable Objects, Queues, Workflows, Workers AI, Vectorize and deployment work.
Do not use this bundle as a substitute for Cloudflare account permissions, dashboard state, production secrets or live Cloudflare API inspection.

reference_block.name: source-rule
reference_block.title: Source rule
reference_block.statement: Only treat developers.cloudflare.com as authoritative for Cloudflare platform claims in this bundle.
If a requested behaviour is not supported by the loaded Cloudflare docs, state the evidence gap and avoid implementation claims.
